name: claude-skills
description: snkrheadz が運用保守する Claude Code スキルのマーケットプレイス。新メンバーが役割別に初日から同じ環境を組めるようにする。

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Cross-role foundation for everyone: first-principles + honest-reasoning + deep-thinking, life-decision support, teaching/onboarding, rich HTML output, and a sensitive-file guard hook. Install this first, whatever your role.

plugins.name: pm
plugins.description: PM / business assets maintained by snkrheadz: the 業務定義シート (task definition sheet) as A4 HTML. Pairs with the external phuryn/pm-skills marketplace for the full PM lifecycle.

plugins.name: eng
plugins.description: Engineering workflow pack that fills gaps the official commands don't cover: create-pr, prune-redundant-skills, review-inbox, test-and-fix, refactor-swarm, techdebt, trace-dataflow, db-query, plus code-architect, architecture-reviewer, verify-shell, migration, oncall and AWS/GCP advisor agents.

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Research pack: arxiv-ai-researcher, gemini-api-researcher and huggingface-spaces-researcher agents for AI/ML paper, API and model discovery. Role-agnostic — for anyone investigating AI/ML papers, APIs and models.

plugins.name: strategy
plugins.description: Personal strategy for the AI-driven shift in work: audit your role's AI exposure (career-ai-scan), map your industry's transformation (industry-ai-map), and find where your expertise x AI opens opportunity (ai-opportunity-scan). Role-agnostic, honest about uncertainty.

plugins.name: writing
plugins.description: Writing pack: strip AI tells from drafts before publishing. stop-ai-slop-jp (Japanese) and stop-ai-slop-en (English) catch predictable AI phrasing, false agency, propositional headings, uniform rhythm, and symbol artifacts. Role-agnostic. Derived from hardikpandya/stop-slop and iKora128/stop-ai-slop-jp (MIT).
